name: openai-image
description: Generate OpenAI-compatible images from Codex, Claude Code, IDE MCP clients, or a local CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Generate image files from prompts or batch jobs through MCP.
interface.longDescription: OpenAI Image adds a reusable image-generation workflow for Codex, Claude Code, and IDE MCP clients. It supports prompt styles, batch JSON files, dry-run planning, OpenAI-compatible base URLs, retries, and structured manifests with saved file paths.
defaultPrompt: Generate a polished product mockup image from this prompt.
Plan an image payload with the paper-figure style before generating.
Run this image batch and return the saved file paths.
